subject: Re: Tilt series deselected with change_selection still processed
body: I've been using --input_data include.txt with a list of all tilt series except the ones I want to exclude but that's cumbersome. I'll try deleting XMLs. What about excluding only certain tilts? For example, if I have 49 images in a tilt series and only the highest tilt is blocked/bad, can I exclude that and reconstruct a tomogram with the remaining 48 tilts? change_selection claims to work on warp_frameseries.settings also but now I'm dubious.
